title: AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Research Associate III Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age limit relaxable as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.details: MD / MDS from NMC / NDC recognized medical / dental college. Experience in conducting systematic reviews and meta-analysis as demonstrated by certified training and at least 02 published systematic reviews as the first or corresponding author in MEDLINE indexed journals. Good manuscript writing skills. Good communication skills. Certified training in systematic review protocol development and conductance, meta-analyses software, GRADE approach and GRADE Evidence to Decision (EtD) framework.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III recruitment is 31st May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD / MDS degree from an NMC / NDC recognized medical / dental college, along with specific experience in systematic reviews and meta-analysis, including published work and certified training.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate III post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate III post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 67,000 per month, plus Rs. 20,100 as HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate III post in AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the AIIMS Delhi Research Associate III recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate III role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by a personal discussion or interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a link to the PDF is provided.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.
